summary: Pre-redeploy gate PASSED. All 7 review-request items verified on preview (https://govcon-workspace.preview.emergentagent.com). Marketing site, real-email register path (Resend accepted silently, no verifyUrl in response, no [EMAIL-ERROR] in backend logs), QA login → dashboard, AOR-certified onboarding (checkbox gate enforced client- and server-side), and session persistence across full-page reload are all functional. Cookies set correctly (Secure=true, HttpOnly=true, SameSite=None) so cross-origin session survives reload.

verified_checks.check: GET / (logged-out) → 302→/home; hero 'Win federal work with an AI capture manager on your team' present; nav has 'Sign in' + 'Start free' buttons
GET /resources renders and includes 'Anthropic', 'SAM.gov', and 'API key' setup guidance

POST /api/auth/register (fresh account verify.check.1783329822@testmail.dev + aor.check.1783330011@testmail.dev) → HTTP 200, response keys = ['id','email','name','emailVerified','createdAt','organizations','pendingOrganizations'], NO 'verifyUrl' field. Backend log shows no [EMAIL-MOCK] and no [EMAIL-ERROR] — Resend HTTP call returned <300 (accepted).
Login via /login UI with qa.captureagent@testmail.dev / CaptureQA#2026 → lands on /dashboard; user has 'QA Verification Org' (owner)

Onboarding: data-testid='aor-certify-checkbox' + 'org-name' + 'create-org-submit' all present. Submitting WITHOUT the checkbox surfaces data-testid='onboarding-error' with text 'You must certify that you are the AOR / Administrator to continue.' Ticking the checkbox and submitting → POST /api/orgs = 200 and navigation to /dashboard.
Session persistence: after login, full page reload keeps user on /dashboard (not redirected to /login). Cookies: access_token + refresh_token, both Secure=True, HttpOnly=True, SameSite=None.

email_delivery_evidence.backend_email_mock_line_after_resend_set: NONE (no [EMAIL-MOCK] emitted for verify.check.* or aor.check.* accounts)
email_delivery_evidence.backend_email_error_line: NONE (no [EMAIL-ERROR] emitted; Resend accepted with status <300)
email_delivery_evidence.note: Since Resend returned success silently, no verify-token URL was capturable from server logs. Real inbox delivery status can only be confirmed by inspecting the recipient inbox / Resend dashboard.

critical_code_review_comments: package.json 'proxy: http://backend:8000' + CRA dev-server: any non-HTML request (e.g. curl without 'Accept: text/html') to a client-side route like /home returns HTTP 500 'Proxy error: Could not proxy request /home ... ENOTFOUND'. Real browsers send 'Accept: text/html,...' so they receive 200 and the SPA loads correctly. Impact = zero for end users on preview/prod; only affects curl smoke-checks. Do NOT remove because user explicitly said 'do not modify package.json'.
AuthContext.jsx bootstrap issue avoided by authedRef — verified: after a successful login the late /auth/me 401 (fired before login completed) does not clobber authenticated state. Working correctly.

email_service.send() raises RuntimeError on Resend 3xx/4xx/5xx, but auth.register catches it and only prints [EMAIL-ERROR]. That means a Resend rejection is invisible in the API response — user sees success even though the verify email never went out. Consider surfacing a soft warning field (e.g. 'emailQueued': false) so the frontend can offer a resend prompt. Reporting only; do NOT change per user instructions.
Frontend eslint warnings (Shell.js 'Shield' unused, OpportunityDetail.js 'useMemo' unused, Settings.js 'activeOrg' unused) — cosmetic, non-blocking.
test_credentials: Existing: qa.captureagent@testmail.dev / CaptureQA#2026. Test accounts created (2, as budgeted): verify.check.1783329822@testmail.dev / VerifyCheck#2026 (no org) and aor.check.1783330011@testmail.dev / AorCheck#2026 (owner of 'AOR Test Workspace').
seed_data_creation: 1 new org created: 'AOR Test Workspace' (admin = aor.check.1783330011@testmail.dev). This is intentional per the AOR/onboarding test path; user allowance was 'max 2 accounts, 1 org'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 pre-redeploy gate items are green. Test accounts + 1 org were created against the LIVE Supabase (shared with prod) — flagged for user awareness. Deploy verification file /app/backend/tests/test_deploy_verification.py is stale (expects verifyUrl); do NOT treat its failures as app bugs. Resend delivery is silent-success — verify actual inbox receipt in Resend dashboard before enabling on captureagent.us for real users.
